remediation: Exclude the feature's owned doc/review artifact paths (FeatureArtifactScope.OwnedPaths) from the change-set identity used for prerequisite-freshness evaluation. Add a ChangeSetIdentity.Of overload that subtracts excluded paths; add a CycleService FreshnessIdentity helper that excludes OwnedPaths(state.Feature) plus any caller-supplied incoming-feature owned paths; route Check and Status through it; thread the existing excludedOwnedPaths from ValidateTransitionReadiness into its Check(current.Id) call. Safe: the only diff-kind stage (implement) has no produces, so owned-doc exclusion never hides a code change, and doc/review artifacts are bound by proof hashes not change-set identity.
summary: Prerequisite-freshness change-set identity over-reads a later-stage owned artifact (the /08 drift-review report) staged for a transition, falsely staling the implement (diff) proof and blocking the drift-review->release stamp every cycle.
